title: VulkanMod Plus
description: A VulkanMod-based modpack that takes Minecraft's performance to the next level!
body:
![description banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42d1eb7d8487fffb6edfd3b2e8d13d6f62d2ad49.jpeg)

# **VulkanMod Plus**
🚀 Vulkanize your game!


**📈 FPS comparison**
| Vanilla| Fabulosly Optimized             | VulkanMod (on its own)          | VulkanMod Plus          |
|:-------------------:|:---------------------:|:--------------------:|:--------------------:|
| 609 fps| 917 fps| 1570 fps | 2348 fps|



💎 This modpack has been tested in a wide range of scenarios, from casual play to massive mob farms winning in performance in almost all of them to ensure that it is **The Best Modern Optimization Modpack**


<details>
<summary>🔊Note</summary>

The FPS numbers shown above are based on tests conducted while looking at the nearby landscape with an 8-chunk render distance, using the seed "wasd" in Minecraft version 1.21.1 These tests were performed with version 1.0.0 of this modpack and the latest versions of all modpacks and mods available as of October 5, 2024.

I am not associated with the people behind the VulkanMod project in any way.
</details>
